title: Olivia Adamski | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Associate // Houston
Olivia is an Associate in BAL’s Houston office with a practice focused on Canada. She has nearly a decade of experience advising multinational employers, executives and individuals on Canadian immigration, cross-border mobility, compliance and workforce strategy. Olivia represents clients ranging from emerging companies and students to Fortune 100 corporations and public figures, helping organizations move talent into Canada while maintaining compliance in an increasingly remote and globally distributed workforce. She is known for her pragmatic approach to immigration strategy and her ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable guidance for clients. In addition to her Canadian immigration practice, Olivia has led a global immigration practice, building end-to-end global mobility programs for companies operating across North America, Latin America, Europe, the Middle East and Africa, and Asia-Pacific. Her work included advising on global mobility strategy, establishing international immigration counsel networks and advising companies on workforce continuity and risk mitigation for expiring visa holders, including transition pathways to Canada. Olivia is a member of the Canadian Immigration Lawyers Association. Outside her practice, she enjoys Pilates and spending time with her toy poodle.
University of British Columbia, LL.M. University of Birmingham, LL.B. (Honors) University of British Columbia, B.A., English Literature
Law Society of Ontario
